About.pageSubtitle: Leading Provider of Industrial Air Compressor Solutions in Vietnam
About.companyIntro: KING KONG AIR COMPRESSOR VIETNAM CO., LTD was established in 2015, specializing in premium screw air compressors, all-in-one integrated air systems, and air treatment equipment for manufacturing plants and industrial production.
About.missionText: Deliver world-class industrial compressed air solutions with superior performance, high durability, and optimal energy efficiency for enterprises.
About.visionText: To become the leading supplier of specialized industrial compressed air systems in Vietnam and the region.
About.corePhilosophyText: Quality as Foundation, Reputation First - Always accompanying the sustainable growth of our customers.
About.reason1Text: ISO 9001:2015 certified products, with genuine components strictly inspected before dispatch.
About.reason2Text: Experienced technical team ready for nationwide emergency support and system maintenance 24/7.
About.reason3Text: Direct factory distribution with no middlemen, ensuring the best value and pricing for your business.
About.techSubtitle: Modern compressed air solutions meeting all rigorous factory requirements
About.tech1Text: High-efficiency water and air cooling systems ensure continuous 24/7 operation without overheating.
About.tech2Text: Permanent magnet variable frequency drive adjusts airflow on demand, saving up to 40% on electricity.
About.tech3Text: Multi-stage filtration thoroughly removes moisture and oil vapor to protect downstream equipment.
About.tech4Text: Multi-layer soundproof enclosure minimizes industrial noise, creating a safe working environment.
About.processSubtitle: 4 steps to building the ideal compressed air system for your facility
About.step1Text: Engineers conduct on-site factory surveys to measure required airflow and pressure.
About.step2Text: Propose cost-optimized compressor configurations and detailed quote proposals.
About.step3Text: Rapid installation, test runs, and comprehensive operational training handover.
About.step4Text: Scheduled maintenance and 24/7 on-site technical support throughout system lifetime.
About.ctaTitle: Ready to Upgrade Your Air System?
About.ctaSubtitle: Contact KINKONAC today for a free facility survey and special promotional quote.
